    category: "website",
    isActive: true,
    slug: {
      notIn: [
        "web-development",
        "/web-development"
      ]
    }
  },
  select: {
    title: true,
    slug: true,
    seoDescription: true,
    heroDescription: true,

    image: true,

?   contentTitle?: true,

?   category?: true,

?   createdAt?: true,
?   updatedAt?: true
  },

    createdAt: "desc"
  }
